name: Lisa Murkowski
summary: Republican Senator from Alaska who voted to convict Trump in his second impeachment trial, endorsed Nikki Haley in the 2024 GOP primary, and said she can't get behind Trump in the general election.

keyStatements.quote: President Trump’s actions were an impeachable offense and his course of conduct amounts to incitement of insurrection.
I certainly can't get behind Donald Trump.

timeline.event: Withdrew support for Trump after Access Hollywood tape
Voted to convict Trump in second impeachment
timeline.significance: One of seven Republicans to vote for conviction

timeline.event: Endorsed Nikki Haley in GOP primary
Said she can't get behind Trump
timeline.significance: Confirmed she would not support him in the general election

credibility.background: Long-serving U.S. Senator known for independent streak, member of key Senate committees
positions: Member, Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee

oppositionReasons: Said Trump's actions amounted to incitement of insurrection
Said she can't get behind Trump in 2024
Endorsed Nikki Haley instead of Trump in the GOP primary
endorsement: Endorsed Nikki Haley in 2024 Republican primary; said she can't get behind Trump

sources.title: Murkowski Votes to Convict President Donald J. Trump
Haley Campaign Press Release - Senator Lisa Murkowski Endorses Nikki Haley for President
